display.name: Azure Database for PostgreSQL - Flexible Server Overview
display.description: Overview of Azure Database for PostgreSQL - Flexible Server

display.name: azuremonitor.subscription_id
display.description: Subscription ID for your Azure Account

display.name: name
display.description: Azure Database for PostgreSQL - Flexible Server name

display.name: Backends
display.description: Number of backends connected to this database.

display.name: PgBouncer Active Client Connections
display.description: Client connections associated with a PostgreSQL connection (PgBouncer).

display.name: CPU Percentage
display.description: CPU percent.

display.name: Read IOPS
display.description: Number of data disk I/O read operations per second.

display.name: Database Size
display.description: Total database size.

display.name: Transaction Log Storage Used
display.description: Transaction log storage used.

display.name: Storage Percentage
display.description: Storage percent.

display.name: PgBouncer Active Server Connections
display.description: Connections to PostgreSQL in use by a client connection (PgBouncer).

display.name: Disk IOPS Consumed Percentage
display.description: Percentage of disk I/Os consumed per minute.

display.name: Database Is Alive
display.description: Indicates if the database is up (1) or not (0).

display.name: Tuples Fetched
display.description: Number of rows fetched by queries in this database.

display.name: Storage Used
display.description: Storage used.

display.name: Failed Connections
display.description: Number of failed connections.

display.name: PgBouncer Connection Pools
display.description: Total number of connection pools (PgBouncer).

display.name: Max Connections
display.description: Max connections.

display.name: Transactions Per Second
display.description: Number of transactions executed per second (Preview).

display.name: Max Physical Replication Lag (Bytes)
display.description: Maximum lag in bytes across all asynchronous physical replication slots.

display.name: Read Replica Lag (Seconds)
display.description: Read replica lag in seconds.

display.name: Storage Free
display.description: Storage free.

display.name: Backup Storage Used
display.description: Backup storage used.

display.name: Active Connections
display.description: Active connections.

display.name: Network In
display.description: Network in across active connections.

display.name: Transactions Committed
display.description: Number of transactions committed in this database.

display.name: IOPS
display.description: I/O operations per second.

display.name: Tuples Deleted
display.description: Number of rows deleted by queries in this database.

display.name: Deadlocks
display.description: Number of deadlocks detected in this database.

display.name: Disk Bandwidth Consumed Percentage
display.description: Percentage of disk bandwidth consumed per minute.

display.name: Succeeded Connections
display.description: Number of succeeded connections.

display.name: Memory Percentage
display.description: Memory percent.

display.name: PgBouncer Total Pooled Connections
display.description: Current number of pooled connections (PgBouncer).

display.name: Temporary Files Size
display.description: Total amount of data written to temporary files by queries.

display.name: PgBouncer Waiting Client Connections
display.description: Client connections waiting for a PostgreSQL connection (PgBouncer).

display.name: Network Out
display.description: Network out across active connections.

display.name: PgBouncer Idle Server Connections
display.description: Idle connections to PostgreSQL, ready to service a client (PgBouncer).

display.name: Tuples Updated
display.description: Number of rows updated by queries in this database.

display.name: Disk Queue Depth
display.description: Number of outstanding I/O operations to the data disk.

display.name: Max Logical Replication Lag (Bytes)
display.description: Maximum lag in bytes across all logical replication slots.

display.name: Tuples Returned
display.description: Number of rows returned by queries in this database.

display.name: Transactions Rolled Back
display.description: Number of transactions rolled back in this database.

display.name: Tuples Inserted
display.description: Number of rows inserted by queries in this database.

display.name: Write IOPS
display.description: Number of data disk I/O write operations per second.
